item.title: CareFusion 213, LLC: BD ChloraPrep Scrub Teal, (2% w/v chlorhexidine gluconate (CHG) and 70% v/v isopropyl alcohol) packaged as a) 25 x 26 mL applicators/case, Recall
item.product: BD ChloraPrep Scrub Teal, (2% w/v chlorhexidine gluconate (CHG) and 70% v/v isopropyl alcohol) packaged as a) 25 x 26 mL applicators/case,
item.summary: Lack of assurance of sterility: Unsterilized ChloraPrep & PurPrep Applicators, intended for further processing and sterilization were instead distributed to customers outside of the intended distribution channel Product details: BD ChloraPrep Scrub Teal, (2% w/v chlorhexidine gluconate (CHG) and 70% v/v isopropyl alcohol) packaged as a) 25 x 26 mL applicators/case, NDC 54365-400-39, catalog number 930825NS, b) 50 x 26 mL applicators/case, NDC 54365-400-39, bulk catalog number 930825NS...
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
